_note: Seed GitHub accounts for live scraping + graph expansion. These are the 'orbit' accounts: known founders whose followers are worth cross-referencing.
_demo_note: Scoped seeds for the live 'Run Discovery' demo. These are young, low-follower prior discoveries (students / competitive-programming builders) whose GitHub orbits are dense with unexplored peers, so a scoped run reliably surfaces fresh unknowns on camera. Falls back to github_seeds if these accounts aren't present in the DB.
